data.content: Planning complete. Existing `defaults.profileId` and Defaults-tab selector are already present, but UI/API currently hardcode `autopilot` fallbacks and silently substitute choices. Implement by centralizing live-profile default resolution, comparing saved ids against `listWorkflows()`/`kno profile list` data, showing a visible stale-profile error in settings, preselecting valid saved defaults in `CreateBeatDialog`, and making `POST /api/beats` read settings at creation time when no explicit profile is provided. Add resolver, UI, and API/helper tests; run install plus lint/typecheck/test/build in the implementation worktree.
